So I subbed to your vip gold snipers and I got lifetime membership . Which has lasted a total of 3 month it started on the 20 June  last signal I recieved in August when stuff stated slowing down was the 6 . Sent a mail to admin wondering why it had just slowed of f. Didn’t really get a response then on 22 August got two more after I rejoined as I wonders if I’d left it had just gone totally mute. After leaving channel trying to talk with No admin for the channel a signal came through on the 5 of September. Now I’m getting messages from the AUTOBOT SERVICE PROVIDER TELLING ME THERE PULLING SERVICE AS IT HASNT BEEN PAID FOR. 
I am certain this is just an over sight on your behalf and it will all sort it self out and I would at have done this here but there doesn’t seem anywhere else to voice concern over this matter. Feeling disgruntled at paying £400 for 1 months of good signal and 1 month of parodic at best then a foreclosure notice on the system is all.

I reached $90k today. Thank you for all the knowledge and insights you've shared with me over the past few months. I began this journey in November 2024. Financial education is essential for over 70% of the population, as only a few are truly literate in this area.

It took me over two years of being in the market, I'm really grateful I found one source to recover my money, at least $10k profits weekly. Thanks Aaron Adison.
